_comment: Store zone polygons for the Purplle store. Coordinates are in pixels for each camera's 1920x1080 frame. Zone polygons were derived from manual inspection of CCTV frame captures.

zones.name: Store Entrance
zones._note: The door-frame / doormat area between inside and outside. Tracks appearing here are entering or exiting.

zones.name: Left Display Wall
zones._note: Product shelves / display on the left wall visible in CAM 3. Contains the Purplle branding sign and product racks.

zones.name: Center Aisle
zones._note: Central walking area between the left display wall and the entrance zone.

zones.name: Checkout Area (approx)
zones._note: Approximate checkout / billing area based on CAM 3 partial visibility. The actual counter is better visible in CAM 5. Limitation: queue tracking from this zone is approximate.

zones.name: Outside / Mall Corridor
zones._note: Everything to the right of the door frame — outside the store in the mall corridor.
